name: First Blood
description: Sink the first ship in PvP

name: Tis but a scratch (PvE)
description: Sink 5 NPS' with durability below 20%

name: Tis but a scratch (PvP)
description: Sink 3 other players' ships with durability below 20%

name: Barrel of Death
description: Finish off another player's ship with a powder barrel

name: Gift from the Skies
description: Sink 2 ships with one shot from a mortar or round

name: Beyond the Horizon
description: Escape pursuit with less than half remaining durability

name: Cutthroat
description: Win 5 consecutive matches Tournament Mode

name: Gladiator
description: Win 5 consecutive matches in any mass mode on the Arena

name: Veteran
description: Win an Arena match with less than 30% durability and dealing over 400 damage

name: Leader
description: Get the first place on the Arena as part of a team of three or more players. Counts as a victory.

name: Clean Sweep
description: Win on the Arena in "Battle of Forts" mode without sinking once

name: Under the Dome
description: Win on the Arena in any mass mode, when your ship took no damage and you dealt 400+ damage

name: Arcane
description: Participate actively in a port battle, dealing over 2000 damage

name: Lone Warrior
description: For sinking a Imperial Flagship with 20k+ durability alone (dealing more than 80% damage)

name: Voyager
description: Complete all single-player mode levels

name: Sharpshooter Trial
description: Sink an NPS with higher durability than your own (but not less than 1000) without taking damage

name: Medal of Bravery
description: Complete a single-player mode with half or fewer guns on your ship

name: Medal of Resolve
description: For sinking a 1 rate ship on a 3-6 rate ship (dealing at least 20% damage)

name: Excellent Strategy
description: Win a boarding battle with a smaller crew

name: Lust for Loot
description: Capture or plunder two consecutive merchant ships from the same squadron

name: Decisive Volley
description: Sink an enemy ship with a shot fired before your own ship is destroyed

name: Test of Time
description: Awarded once for reaching 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30 captain ranks

name: Risky Business
description: Smuggle without guns on board, without entering the port

name: Boarding King
description: Successfully board three unique players in a row without entering a port

name: Battle Glory
description: x2 Battle Marks for sinking a player at sea with a higher-rated ship

name: Medal of Mastery
description: x2 experience for sinking an NPS with twice the durability of your ship

name: Plunderer
description: For raiding a fort belonging to a guild, player, or Imperial Flagship and stealing over 4000 cargo units

name: Dominance
description: Sink 5 player ships without entering the port or sinking

name: Shipwright
description: Own more than 5 ships in the dock

name: Collector
description: Own more than 10 ships in the dock

name: Tournament Legend
description: Take the first place in an Arena tournament

name: What Was That?
description: For an unfortunate death... within 30 seconds of leaving the port

name: Cargo Delivered
description: Complete 3 consecutive cargo missions in one game session

name: Bounty Hunter
description: Sink a player from the Legendary Board (PvP) with 3 or more points

name: Treasure Hunter
description: Collect 4 items at sea in less than a minute

name: Legend of the Seas
description: For every time you fill the experience bar after reaching rank 30

name: King of the Tournament
description: Take the second place in the Arena tournament

name: Aristocracy
description: Enter port while having 5 million gold in your account

name: Golden Mania
description: Enter port while having 10 million gold in your account

name: Faction Decree
description: For reaching +100 reputation in any faction or -100 in all as part of a pirate guild.

name: Merchant
description: Trade in the Auction House with a total of 1 million gold in one game session

name: Horn of Plenty
description: Trade in the Auction House with a total of 10 million gold in one game session

name: Fleet Admiral
description: Increased reward for the top spot in the PB rankings (number of spots depends on participants)

name: Craftsman
description: Open a total of 20 Specialty Workshops in total

name: Golden Dinar
description: Contribute to the guild's victory in the tender and earn the Vizier status

name: Endless Mystery
description: Complete a mode on epic difficulty with a 1-2-3 rate ship

name: Armada
description: Collect 12 fully researched legends of the Age of Sail

name: Lucky One
description: Open {0} chests using coins or keys

name: New Frontiers
description: Explore the entire map

name: Recruiter
description: Invite 30 captains to the game

name: Whale Hunter
description: Catch 5 whales in a row while at sea

name: Rubicon
description: For destroying an Empire fort at sea with over 10,000 damage

name: Tournament Finalist
description: For winning bronze in the Arena Tournament

name: Armed Merchant
description: For completing 5 daily quests in one day

name: Arena Legend
description: For a gold place in the Arena ranking

name: Arena King
description: For a silver place in the Arena ranking

name: Arena Prizewinner
description: For a bronze place in the Arena ranking
